generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how our current domestic security laws fall short. We need expanded powers to keep up with evolving threats. The balance between security and civil liberties is complex, but our safety must come first. Trust the experts who've dedicated their lives to protecting this nation. #NationalSecurity #DomesticSafety
